votes.title: DC Bylaw No. 2026-20 (Region-wide Development Charges rate reduction)
votes.description: Passage of Region-wide DC Bylaw 2026-20, cutting development charge rates across all classes of development for the first time in the Region's 55-year history (2-9% residential, 2-35% non-residential decreases).
votes.verification_notes: Decision document exists at source_url but could not be fetched by automated tooling (SSL error on York's document server). Needs a human to open it directly and confirm whether this was a recorded roll-call vote (transcribe member-level results into `results[]` and set source_type to 'recorded_vote') or passed on consent with no individual breakdown (set source_type to 'consent_agenda_no_breakdown', leave results empty).
